review_title: A great tool to assist me with my content development
description: It has been a good experience so far. I believe there are still many areas for improvement, but I am satisfied with its current capabilities. It has helped me optimize my work and save time, which is what I was looking for, along with delivering results and quality to my clients.
author: Carmen Y.
pros: I've been using this tool for a short time, but so far, it has been very useful primarily for creating initial drafts of blog posts, which I then optimize using my own frameworks and other tools. I'm satisfied with the results I've achieved according to current usage.
cons: I see an opportunity area in generating results following an input; it would be very helpful for me to have different responses to create my own text.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool for Personalised Intro Inspiration
description: We're saving a lot of time thinking of cold email icebreakers. WriteCream provides a lot of inspiration for what we can open with in a cold email to prospects. Great tool
author: Joshua L.
pros: WriteCream is focused on personalised content, and I have to say it's really good. All you have to is the input the company's url or the person's Linkedin link, and you'll get several decently formatted and personalised email openers. Better than most cold outreach writing tools out there.
cons: The other aspects like AIDA, PAS, and more have outputs that are nearly identical to the default outputs from OpenAI. Not very good there. The credits system in their plans also needs to be changed to a character limit system so it's easier to track how much we have used.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Yes, I have been using writcream for a little over a year now. I have had a really positive experience with them. I have been able to customize my writing experience with them because I have a lot of control over what I am doing. I have been able to work on my assignments in the most efficient way possible.
author: Ahmed R.
pros: The main advantage of the write cream program is that it is a great way for you to work remotely and still get paid for your work. The product is easy to use, integrates with your existing business processes and you don't have to worry about the program stealing your hard work.
cons: There are a few disadvantages that you could find with writecream. First off, I personally feel that the pricing is a little bit high because it is a monthly subscription. If you were to purchase it in the long-term, it would be significantly cheaper, but if you only want to use it for a few months it may not be worth the money. Another drawback could be that it's not mobile friendly. I know that it wasn't created for mobile, but for many people this is a huge part of their life. It's not impossible to use, but it would probably be a little more difficult. Finally, for some people it may be difficult to integrate it into their current business. This may be due to the product being too new or not understanding how it works.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I came across the writecream AI website and checked out the product. I liked that the claims were made without any bias and that the product was affordable. I also liked that the product actually works. The AI technology is great because it helps one to quickly find the best keywords and best topics to write about. The AI technology is also able to analyze the original language of the article, which is important for those who write in languages other than English.
author: Md A Wahab S.
pros: Writecream AI is the best AI article writer I've tried so far. It's easy to use and I get a lot of traffic from the articles I write. I love that I can use it for free for the first 100 articles. It's also easy to use, especially for beginners. I love that it works 24/7 and I can write articles anytime I want.
cons: I was looking for a tool that would help me write content more quickly. I found Writecream AI and thought it was the perfect solution! I love how easy it is to use and how it saves me time. It is easy to set up and start writing in minutes. I also like how I am able to have a private or public profile. I have been able to use this tool for my blog and for my Instagram posts.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: tohid K.
pros: Writecream is the writing website that takes the hassle out of writing. You're busy, and you have better things to do than spend hours trying to write a blog post or an email. Writecream understands that, so they've made it easier for you to get the content you need, faster than ever before! They have a team of professional writers who can write articles for your business, or even just for you as an individual. I recently used them to write a blog post about my favorite dog breed (the corgi), and it only took me about 10 minutes from start to finish! I was able to choose from several different categories and styles, so I could make sure that my article had just the right tone and style. The whole process was super easy—all I had to do was give them some information about what kind of article I wanted written (and where), then they sent me back a draft within a couple hours. After that, all I had to do was approve it and boom: it was live on my site! If you're looking for an easy way to get more content written without having to do any of the heavy lifting yourself, look no further than Writecream!
cons: There's nothing in this product that i don't like
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: This program is so smart, it makes my brain hurt! Seriously though, this program has made my copywriting skills 100 times better. When you use this tool, you will be amazed at how well it understands what you are trying to communicate and delivers "just-right" written content that is grammatically correct and perfectly conveys your message. This is truly a ground-breaking product and I think all copywriters should have access to it. This is by far the best piece of AI software I've ever used. I can't imagine any serious writer not wanting to use this tool!
author: David C.
pros: This is by far the best writing tool I've ever used. It's so simple and yet so powerful. I can't even describe it to you. All you have to do is type in what you want to write and then, bam! this thing does the rest. I've been using it almost every day since I got it and I am still finding new and exciting ways to improve my writing.
cons: Nothing to dislike. It's easy to use. It's fast. And most of all. It WORKS! My favorite thing about this tool is it will adapt to your style. If you are a prolific writer who produces hundreds of pages a week. it will learn your style and improve itself over time. There's no need for you to push it. In fact, there's no need for you to do anything except sit back and let it work for you.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Writecream is a simple, affordable tool that allows me to make customized sales emails for a variety of purposes. I love the interface and the ease of use. I've been able to create sales emails for blog posts, promotions, and sales promotions. The tool is so simple and easy to use that I never have to worry about the quality of my marketing emails.
author: VANDA C.
pros: Writecream is the most effective way to get my marketing message across. This tool is so easy to use that I can be up and running in no time. I love the app because it allows me to create a marketing message in minutes. One of the best function is when I added in a LinkedIn profile link and the system immediately generate the message for me to do the outreach!
cons: The part I didn't like is the limit of credits, other than that I don't find anything else that I dislike.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nilayan G.
pros: Writecream is one of the several AI writing tools in the market. It helps you write social media content, ad copies, blogs and more. But that's what any AI writing tool does anyway. But what sets Writecream apart from the competition? There's quite a few things, and I'll share my favourites among them. 1. Personalized cold outreach is where Writecream shines. 2. LinkedIn Personalization - You have to enter a LinkedIn profile, the tools reads reads the content and and writes a personalized intro message. 3. Email personalization - It reads the content of a webpage and writes a personalized email intro. 4. Image icebreaker - Another unique tool. You'll need to enter a website URL and Writecream will go through the content and create a personalized image and an intro in it. 5. Backlink assist - This has been a relief for me personally. Here, you would need to enter an article URL that Writecream reads and writes a personalized email to get a backlink.
cons: Being someone who likes writing long-form content, I would want Writecream to work more on that aspect.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: 11 out of 10 (and 12 for their support team 😁)
description: IT IS SO SIMPLE AND SO EFFECTIVE TO USE IT that I am quite sure I would get more results and more time, using this terrific tool in my daily social selling.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: *.- Before I've bought it, their web support team has answered me in less than 5 minutes, each one of the questions I've asked (more than 10 😅). *.- 200 credits is equivalent to 400k characters, so you will generate much more content for your requirements. *.- You can write 20-25 or up to 50 blog articles per month, depending on the length of the blog article. *.- You can use audio icebreakers, create voiceovers (IN SPANISH LANGUAGE), image icebreakers, long form editor, etc. tools which are not present in other tools. *.- You can write eCommerce product descriptions with it. *.- They have planned integration with the tool I use to automate my cold outreach: Salesblink. *.- They've got more than 16 planned improvements in their roadmap which are just great all of them.
cons: NOT SO GOOD (to me): *.- Each profile is isolated for the team members. *.- Each teammate has their own workspace
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
